title: Three babies born into Sudan war every minute, charity warns
detail: A charity has warned that three babies are being born into Sudan's ongoing civil war every minute, highlighting the severe humanitarian crisis facing the country. The statistic underscores the massive scale of the conflict's impact on civilians, particularly vulnerable populations including pregnant women and newborns who lack access to proper medical care amid the fighting between SAF and RSF forces.

media.caption: Sudan's ongoing conflict has created a severe humanitarian crisis affecting civilians including newborns and pregnant women
